title: Pat Cummins Is On The Way To Becoming An All-Time Great Captain After Australia's Win In Pakistan
text: After claiming their first Test series win away from home since 2016, Australia savored a memorable victory in Pakistan and were led magnificently by Pat Cummins who is quickly becoming a great captain.
